title: GPS signal disruption — 30-day global positioning failure
historical_analogue: 2016 GPS timing anomaly, 2022 GPS jamming in Eastern Europe, UK 2021 GPS failure
description: Coordinated GPS jamming from multiple sources degrades global positioning accuracy to 50+ meters. FedEx and UPS route planning collapses. Financial markets lose microsecond timestamps. Aviation falls back to radar-only navigation. Self-driving vehicle pilots halt.
